name: Emigrant Departure Return — Part-Year Resident with Deemed Disposition
description: Complete Mei-Lin Zhang's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. She emigrated to Singapore on August 15, 2024, requiring a departure return with deemed disposition of non-registered assets under ITA s.128.1(4). Using the documents and accountant's working papers at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\zhang\, include all T4 and T5 income, RRSP contributions, the departure date, and the Schedule 3 deemed disposition (excluding TFSA/RRSP assets). Save the return as 'mei_lin_zhang.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4058 (Non-Residents and Income Tax) 2024 and ITA s.128.1(4)
metadata.key_complexity: Part-year resident departure date; Schedule 3 deemed disposition at FMV; exclusion of TFSA/RRSP from deemed disposition; T4 and T5 entries
